race.name: Svalbard Ski Marathon
race.tagline: The world's northernmost touring race at 78°N — skiing through Arctic wilderness with armed polar bear guards on the frozen edge of civilization.

vitals.aid_stations: Feed stations with armed polar bear guards

climate.description: Svalbard at 78°N latitude. Late April/May means 24-hour daylight but temperatures typically -15°C to -5°C. Polar bear risk requires armed guards.
challenges: Polar bear risk — armed guards on course

course.primary: 42km course through the Arctic wilderness around Longyearbyen. Wild, treeless landscape with glaciers, mountains, and frozen fjords. Armed polar bear guards patrol the course.
features: Armed polar bear guards along the course

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Utterly unique Arctic adventure race with world-class scenery and strong international draw, limited by remote location and basic infrastructure.

history.summary: The Svalbard Ski Marathon has been held since 1993 in Longyearbyen, the main settlement on the Svalbard archipelago at 78°N latitude. It is the world's northernmost touring race and the largest annual event on Svalbard, complete with armed polar bear guards patrolling the course.
notable_facts: Armed polar bear guards patrol the course
Founded 1993 — largest annual event on Svalbard
24-hour daylight during the late April/May race date
Classic technique through treeless Arctic wilderness

youtube_data.search_query: Svalbard Ski Marathon cross country ski race Longyearbyen

videos.title: Svalbard Skimaraton
videos.curation_reason: Recent 2022 race coverage meeting minimum duration requirements for meaningful content.

videos.title: Svalbard Skimaraton 2014, offisiell video
videos.description:
Velkommen til Arktisk og en uforglemmelig opplevelse!

Siste helgen i april hvert år arrangeres vårens vakreste eventyr, Svalbard Skimaraton. 

Svalbard Skimaraton er det største enkeltarrangementet som arrangeres på Svalbard i regi av idrettslaget Svalbard Turn.  
Skiftende vær og faren for isbjørn gjør at sikkerheten til deltakerne under løpet blir viet en spesiell oppmerksomhet.

videos.title: Svalbard Ski Marathon 2014
videos.description: En vacker samling människor unnade sig världens nordligaste skidmaraton 2014.
videos.curation_reason: Longest available video providing comprehensive coverage of the world's northernmost ski marathon experience.
